home.available: Available for full-stack, automation, and repository cleanup work
home.name: Evyatar Hazan
home.subtitle: Full Stack Developer building reliable, clean, production-ready products
home.description: I connect sharp frontends, structured backends, and developer workflows that hold up over time. This site highlights real projects, public repositories, CI, monorepos, and tools that show how I think about product, code, and trust.
home.whatsappText: Hi Evyatar, I saw your website and would like to talk about a project.

repos.title: 6 selected projects
repos.description: Public products and tools across React, TypeScript, backend, mobile, and CI.

delivery.title: Built for trust
delivery.description: Clean repositories, validation scripts, careful secrets handling, and checkable documentation.

systems.title: Real full stack
systems.description: Interfaces, APIs, Prisma, OAuth, Cloudinary, React Native, and monorepos.

about.p1: I focus on full-stack product development with a strong emphasis on clean architecture, accessible user experiences, and reliable developer workflows. My projects are organized as maintainable repositories with clear scripts, CI, and careful handling of secrets.
about.p2: My current portfolio includes public monorepos, client-side utilities, medical and nonprofit tools, a React Native password generator, and several backend-driven products. I like turning messy project history into focused, credible software assets.

projects.subtitle: Each card shows the problem, the solution, my role, and the project status. Live links only appear when they are verified, keeping the portfolio credible.

online_converter.title: Online Converter
online_converter.description: A browser-only conversion tool for JSON, CSV, XML, and YAML.
online_converter.problem: Users need to convert data without uploading files to an external server.
online_converter.solution: A React and TypeScript interface with i18n, copy, download, and client-side validation.
online_converter.role: Architecture, frontend, UX flows, and CI scripts.

emergency_protocol.title: Emergency Protocol Diagram
emergency_protocol.description: A full-stack monorepo for managing and discussing emergency protocols.
emergency_protocol.problem: Complex protocols are hard to understand, update, and share across stakeholders.
emergency_protocol.solution: A React client, Express API, Prisma, Google OAuth, comments, and validation flow.
emergency_protocol.role: Monorepo structure, API, authentication, UI, and test infrastructure.

lev_chedva.title: Lev Hedva
lev_chedva.description: A monorepo for the Lev Hedva website, client app, and backend API.
lev_chedva.problem: A nonprofit digital property needs to be clear, maintainable, and ready to grow.
lev_chedva.solution: A separated website, client, and backend with shared infrastructure and organized scripts.
lev_chedva.role: Repository organization, frontend layer, API, and developer workflows.

password_gen.title: Password Generator
password_gen.description: A privacy-first monorepo with a React Native app and reusable core package.
password_gen.problem: A basic security tool must be simple, local, and independent of external services.
password_gen.solution: A reusable core package and mobile app that generate passwords on-device.
password_gen.role: Core logic, package structure, React Native, and privacy-first design.

test_yourself.title: Test Yourself
test_yourself.description: A learning and quiz platform with a React client and Express API.
test_yourself.problem: Practice systems need to be easy to extend and validate without breaking existing content.
test_yourself.solution: A TypeScript monorepo with client, API, validation scripts, and CI.
test_yourself.role: Product structure, frontend, backend, and validation flow.

united_hatzalah.title: United Hatzalah Shoham Branch
united_hatzalah.description: A branch website and admin interface with React, Express, Prisma, and Cloudinary.
united_hatzalah.problem: A local branch needs a reliable website and admin workflow without code changes for every update.
united_hatzalah.solution: A full-stack system with media, database models, API, and structured deployment.
united_hatzalah.role: Frontend, backend, data models, media uploads, and CI.

contact.subtitle: Reach out for full-stack products, automation workflows, repository cleanup, frontend products, or technical credibility work.
contact.getInTouchDesc: WhatsApp is the most direct channel. Email and LinkedIn are available too.
contact.whatsappText: Hi Evyatar, I saw your website and would like to talk about a project.

form.msgPh: Tell me briefly what you want to build...
form.successMsg: Message sent successfully. I will get back to you soon.
form.errorMsg: Message delivery failed. You can reach out directly on WhatsApp or email.
